security_findings.title: Hardcoded high_entropy Detected
security_findings.description:
Meaning: A high-entropy string (possible secret) was detected.
Reason: Randomized strings often indicate API keys or secrets that should be externalized.

Context:
GEMINI_API_KEY=  AIzaSyBm8ATBJML_nobWAo0AZAKm_x3F7AGURp4
security_findings.remediation: Move sensitive data to environment variables or secure vault
